text.message: Guys don’t let black plow me for the 6 ore
It’s the only port I can get
I’d rather let black have the spot
I’m not giving you a 2 for 1 for a wood
Gl getting wood later without port
Me getting the road is good for all of our games
I’m not a road building set up
That’s what I’ll do or I’ll port
lol you got a wheat and brick for a wood hahhaa
I’m in the worst position of the game
Greens over here crying and yall just give him the game
Bro if you got the 6 it was game
And you having the 6 all to yourself is just fine right
Easier to handle when I can’t build anywhere if it’s blocked
Agreed hard with a ton of spots but agreed
Blue we are both in good spots
lol and black wondered why I needed to get the 6 haha
I can’t do anything now I have no ports and used all settles
And red is at 7 with 3 down zsevs
Ya because you’ve been tunnel visioned on me
